subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-23 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: They were present in a certain place with Áqá Mírzá Javád-i-Khurásání and Mírzá Áqá Ján, and verily Áqá Mírzá Javád was most irascible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایشان در یک محلی با آقا میرزا جواد خراسانی  و میرزا آقا جان  تشریف داشتند و اینکه آقا میرزا جواد خیلی تندخو
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
